titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 198: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 198. (A.R. No. 7 of 1920.) TIRUMAḺAVĀḌI, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Vaidyanātha temple.

This is an unfinished inscription. It records the gift of a copper image for the procession weighing twenty-five palam, a bronze pedestal (for placing the śrībali image) weighing eighty palam, a silver vessel for use in the performance of abhishēka weighing thirty-three kaḻañju and a bronze tray weighing twenty palam for placing the betel leaves and areca-nut and an aḍidharā (pedestal lamp) weighing twenty palam to the temple of Tirumaḻavāḍi āḻvār, a dēvadāṉa in Poygai-nāḍu by Śāliyan Āchchan Dhūrjaṭi, a resident of Gaṇḍarāditta-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 399.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 16Āvatu poykai nāṭṭu tevatāṉam tirumaḻavāṭi Āḻvārkku śrīkaṇṭarātittac caturvedimaṅkalattu cāliyan Āccan tūṟcaṭi śrīpali Eḻun=taruḷa vaitta koḷkai cepput tirumeni niṟai Irupattaim palamum cen=tarā pātapiṭam niṟai Eṇpatinpalamum Ittevarkku Abhi
ṣekam ceyta veḷḷi niṟai muppattu mukkaḻañcu Aṭaikkāyyamutu ceya vaitta Ilaikkum veṇkalattalai niṟai Irupatin palamum Aṭitarā niṟai Irupatin palamum ne
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
